title: Remove formulas section and industry growth percentage field

requirements.text: Remove the 'View formulas' button from the CalculatorActions component
acceptanceCriteria: The 'View formulas' button is no longer visible in the calculator actions
The FormulasDialog component is no longer rendered or accessible

requirements.text: Remove the FormulasDialog component instantiation and related state from App.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: FormulasDialog is not imported or used in App.tsx
Any state managing the formulas dialog visibility is removed

requirements.text: Remove the 'Industry Growth Percentage' field from the DcfInputsForm component

quotes: Remove the text and button of Industry growth percentage

acceptanceCriteria: The input field for industry growth percentage is not displayed in the form
No label or description text for industry growth percentage is visible

requirements.text: Remove the industryGrowthPercent field from the DcfInputs interface in presets.ts and all preset configurations (DEFAULT_INPUTS, EXAMPLE_INPUTS, VERIFICATION_INPUTS)

quotes: Remove the text and button of Industry growth percentage

acceptanceCriteria: DcfInputs interface no longer includes industryGrowthPercent property
All preset input objects do not contain industryGrowthPercent values

requirements.text: Update the backend DcfInput record type in main.mo to remove the industryGrowthPercent field

quotes: Remove the text and button of Industry growth percentage

acceptanceCriteria: Backend DcfInput type definition does not include industryGrowthPercent
All backend calculation functions using DcfInput work correctly without this field

requirements.text: Remove any references to industryGrowthPercent from the formulas registry and calculation logic in formulas.ts

quotes: Remove the text and button of Industry growth percentage

acceptanceCriteria: All calculations work correctly without the industryGrowthPercent input
No console errors or undefined value warnings appear

constraints: Preserve all other DCF calculation inputs and functionality
Maintain existing validation logic for remaining fields
Keep the calculator's overall layout and styling intact
nonGoals: Modifying any other calculator features or inputs
Changing the styling or design of remaining components
